name: Azalea Swim and Tennis Club
description: Come play pickleball at Azalea Swim and Tennis Club in Dothan, AL! There are 3 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Eastgate Park
description: Eastgate Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ashford, AL. There are 4 outdoor clay courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Ridgecrest Baptist Church
description: Ridgecrest Baptist Church is a place to play pickleball in Dothan, AL. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Ridgecrest Baptist Church (RBC) gym
description: Playtimes are subject to change or cancellation due to other church activities. We have all the necessary equipment, just show up.
open_play_schedule: Posted on Facebook Pickleball Dothan group

name: Walton Park
description: Walton Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dothan, AL. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Wiregrass Park Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Wiregrass Park Recreation Center in Dothan, AL! There are 9 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.
